modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be distracting grammar usage and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Inquiry about Ethernet and wireless availability in dorms and campus.

full_description_text: 
The user was asking if all dorm rooms have Ethernet connections. They also wanted to know where wireless internet is available on campus. This was during a live chat, and they seemed unsure about the internet options in their area.
short_description: Inquiry about Ethernet and wireless availability in dorms and campus.
description: The user was asking if all dorm rooms have Ethernet connections. They also wanted to know where wireless internet is available on campus. This was during a live chat, and they seemed unsure about the internet options in their area.
